assumptions: count-only WU-UCT selection: pending inflates an arm's effective visit count, no value penalty
workers are assigned one at a time within a wave and see prior pending updates (VL de-collision)
a pending evaluation started at wave t completes at wave t+latency
common random numbers (per-wave, per-worker jitter) are shared across VL policies
prohibited_inferences: a synthetic collision/throughput number is a wall-clock speedup
CPU or energy efficiency without measured runtime or energy
transfer of the synthetic collision model to the real engine without the Rust bridge

scenarios.label: One best arm above a graded cluster (8 arms)
